title: Sped Up Mobs
description: Adds 3 new gamerules that lets you make mobs faster!
body:
This mod adds 3 new gamerules, all have a minimum value of 1 and a maximum of 100

Mob AI Tick Speed (mobAItickRateMultiplier) 

-This gamerule speeds up the tick rate of mob AI

Mob Movement Speed Multiplier (mobMoveSpeedMultiplier)

-This gamerule speeds up mob movement speed in general

Mob Action Speed Multiplier (mobActionSpeedMultiplier)

-This gamerule speeds up mob actions such as using items and attacking
